title: drop_file
description: Remove a `file copy`/`file materialize` install directive (non-patch destinations). For patch files under dragonfly/patch-*, use drop_patch instead.

target.description: Destination relpath (the '-> <target>' side of the directive). Must NOT be a dragonfly/patch-* path — route those through drop_patch.

reason.description: Why this file is obsolete — lands in the intent log and the operator commit message

scope.description: Build-line section to search. '@any' (default) targets the universal section. '@current' resolves to the env's current target at apply time. Never type literal '@2026Q2'; the runner injects t.target.
